title: Why Labour is tightening UK immigration rules
summary: The article explains the reasoning behind Labour's proposed immigration reforms and how they differ from previous migration policies.

title: UK plans to end 'failed free market experiment' in immigration
summary: Reuters reports on the UK government's plan to tighten immigration rules by restricting skilled worker visas and pushing businesses to train local workers.

title: UK plans to double permanent settlement wait for some migrants already in country
summary: This article covers proposals to make some migrants wait longer before qualifying for permanent settlement in the UK.

title: How the Trump administration plans to keep tabs on 450,000 migrant children who crossed the border alone
summary: AP explains a federal review process affecting migrant children who crossed the U.S.-Mexico border without their parents.
